title: Onno Garms
text: Home * People * Onno Garms Onno Garms [1] Onno Garms , a German mathematician, computer scientist and awarded [2] researcher at Fraunhofer Institute for Algorithms and Scientific Computing SCAI , working on the broad range of optimization problems such as packing problems along with computational complexity theory [3] . He holds a diplom degree in mathematics and a Ph.D. in computer science both from University of Bonn in 1999 and 2006 respectively. As former youth chess player and autodidact programmer, he developed the chess engine Onno , which was commercially released in 2009 [4] . In March 2011, Onno Garms announced the end of Onno's development [5] , and revealed many ideas that made Onno stronger.
